title: nocca mollis
intro: Nocca mollis, also known as Nootka woollyweed, is a flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae, native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nocca mollis are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Nocca mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
